selection_rule.policy: Track the latest minor.patch of each of the newest 3 major versions that publish REST API files. If fewer than 3 majors publish files, fill the remaining slots with the previous minor lines of the newest major.

tracked.provenance: Official MiR250 3.5.4 swagger.json, mirrored from github.com/processrobotics/mir-api@master
Community conversion of the official MiR100 2.7.0 REST API PDF, from github.com/osrf/mir100-client@master

wanted: Latest 2.14.x official file (replaces the 2.7.0 community seed)
Latest 3.5.x+ official file if newer than 3.5.4
Third slot per selection rule (3.4.x, or a 4.x/1.x major if the portal lists one)
notes: The support portal requires a (free) account; anonymous scraping is blocked by a server-side login wall. The scrape workflow fills 'wanted' entries once MIR_PORTAL_EMAIL/MIR_PORTAL_PASSWORD secrets are configured.
